name: Paladin
_comment: Paladin (Fighter + Cleric). Heavy fighter with priest healing. Can use all weapons and up to plate armor. Gains Turn Undead at level 5.

class_abilities.name: Turn Undead
class_abilities.description: From level 5, a Paladin can channel holy energy to Turn Undead: every undead on the battlefield must make a Wisdom save or be destroyed; those that succeed still take 50% of their HP in radiant damage.
